summary: Solid, production-ready solution. PowerShell follows best practices: proper error handling with `$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'`, parameter validation, type safety with `-is [IDictionary]` checks, clear error messages. Workflow well-structured: clear job separation, least-privilege permissions, sensible triggers. Helper functions (Get-CartesianProduct, Test-RuleMatches) avoid duplication effectively. Minor issues: (1) actions/upload-artifact@v4 unpinned to SHA (lines 26, 57)—violates action-pinning best practice; (2) parameter-binding explanation (lines 106–109) verbose. Would ship with actions pinned to full-length SHAs.
